more.title: Econet’s 5G Network Now Exceeds NetOne and Telecel’s Combined Infrastructure
more.description: Harare- Econet Wireless Zimbabwe ended the fourth quarter of 2025 operating 340 5G base stations, 1,825 LTE stations, 1,997 3G stations, and 2,981 2G stations, a total active network of 7,143 base stations across all four generations of mobile technology. In the same quarter, NetOne’s combined infrastructure across all technologies totalled 4,838 stations and Telecel’s [...] The post Econet’s 5G Network Now Exceeds NetOne and Telecel’s Combined Infrastructure appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Ex-Generations Actress Sonia Mbele’s Zimbabwean House Manager Scandal: The Dark Side of Celebrity Parenting Exposed
more.description: The glittering façade of South Africa’s entertainment industry often obscures the complex, and sometimes exploitative, realities that keep it running. Recently, acclaimed actress and producer Sonia Mbele found herself at the epicentre of a fierce social media storm after publicly crediting her Zimbabwean house manager for raising her children. What began as a seemingly innocent [...] The post Ex-Generations Actress Sonia Mbele’s Zimbabwean House Manager Scandal: The Dark Side of Celebrity Parenting Exposed first appeared on My Zimbabwe News .

more.title: Advocate Thabani Mpofu files US$1 million defamation suit against Wafawarova
more.description: Prominent constitutional lawyer Advocate Thabani Mpofu has filed a US$1 million lawsuit against journalist Reason Wafawarova in the High Court of Zimbabwe, alleging defamation arising from a series of Facebook posts published earlier this month. The post Advocate Thabani Mpofu files US$1 million defamation suit against Wafawarova appeared first on Nehanda Radio .

more.title: Shingai just dropped ‘Mhondoro’, and it is a theatrical experience
